prompts.text: tape machine stopping with characteristic pitch-dropping slowdown, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
reel-to-reel decelerating with warping speed reduction, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out
cassette player pressing stop with mechanical click and tape halt, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

analog recording ending with flutter and wow artifacts, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

magnetic tape tension releasing as transport mechanism halts, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
